gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT, SUM(T2.PREGNANCY_WOMEN_HB_LEVEL_LESS_11) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_MATERNAL_REGISTRATION_TESTING AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T3 ON T2.TIME_ID = T3.TIME_ID WHERE T1.STATE = 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands' AND T3.YEAR = '2021' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT HAVING SUM(T2.PREGNANCY_WOMEN_HB_LEVEL_LESS_11) > 0 ORDER BY SUM(T2.PREGNANCY_WOMEN_HB_LEVEL_LESS_11) DESC LIMIT 5
predicted_sql:
SELECT dg.sub_district, SUM(fmrt.pregnancy_women_hb_level_less_11) AS total_low_hb_women
FROM dim_geography dg
JOIN fact_maternal_registration_testing fmrt ON dg.geography_id = fmrt.geography_id
JOIN dim_time dt ON fmrt.time_id = dt.time_id
WHERE dt.year = 2021 AND dg.state ILIKE 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands'
GROUP BY dg.sub_district
ORDER BY total_low_hb_women DESC
LIMIT 5;
